{{Quote|Yolan Bren, forgive me...!|The unnamed Solem|<ref name="Empire 7">[[Empire 7|''Empire'' 7]]</ref>}}
This '''unidentified soldier''' was a native of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Solem]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], and part of a resistance movement against the planetary Governor, [[Malvander Bren]].

==Biography==
[[File:UnnamedSolemDeath.jpg|thumb|left|100px|Fett shoots the Solem.]]
{{Quote|Do it! you've killed plenty of good men before! What does one more matter?|The unnamed Solem's last words to Boba Fett|<ref name="Empire 7" />}}
This soldier fought in the [[Battle of Solem]], and lost his left leg in the conflict. Left dying on the battlefield, the soldier was approached by [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]], who asked him of the whereabouts of [[Yolan Bren]]. The soldier refused to help Fett, until the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] stomped down on his stub of a leg. In pain, the soldier finally told Fett what he wanted to know. Leaving the soldier to die, Fett turned away, but the Solem's conscience would not allow this. Regretting his [[Treason/Legends|treason]], the soldier reached for a [[Blaster rifle/Legends|blaster rifle]] and tried to shoot Fett in the back. Fett was quicker, however, and disarmed the Solem before killing him with a shot to the head.

==Appearances==
*[[Empire 7|''Empire'' 7]] {{1st}}
